---
title: Support and Contact
---

The following support channels are available:

* The [Qualtrics website](https://www.qualtrics.com/support/) provides extensive documentation on how to use the tool, including the configuration of advanced features.

* Your faculty's Data Steward/Privacy Champion (see Qualtrics Faculty Contact – Division Managers) can assist with questions related to survey design and faculty policies regarding the usage of Qualtrics within your specific research area. Students should contact their course coordinator.

* The [FAQ Page](faq.qmd){target="_blank"} addresses common issues, such as login problems or errors encountered when using collaboration or email distribution functionalities.

* The [RDM Support Desk](mailto:rdm@vu.nl) is available for additional questions and can provide further assistance.
